passives.effects: At 55 minutes (Clash), this turret begins to malfunction, losing {{as|armor}} and {{as|magic resist}}. After 5 minutes, it starts breaking down, losing an increasing percentage of its {{as|{{sti|health|'''maximum''' health}}}} every 30 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: At 55 minutes, the turret begins to malfunction, losing armor and magic resist.
5 minutes later, the turret starts breaking down, losing an increasing percentage of max health every 30 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Sudden Death starts with a timed resistance-loss phase, then transitions to periodic structure max-health decay. The percentage values are mode-defined and not provided in this item payload.
Clash page-level behavior: resistance loss starts at 55:00, then escalating max-health decay starts at 60:00 in 30-second ticks.
Swiftplay uses different Sudden Death timing/values (Overcharged starts earlier), so this file keeps Clash-aligned timing semantics and tracks mode variance in sources.
